news.title:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.
news.summary:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.

news.title:
Shree Cement commissioned a 3.65 MTPA clinkerisation unit in Karnataka.
Kodla plant's clinker capacity now totals 7.15 MTPA, boosting capabilities.
news.summary:
Shree Cement commissioned a 3.65 MTPA clinkerisation unit in Karnataka.
Kodla plant's clinker capacity now totals 7.15 MTPA, boosting capabilities.

news.title:
Shree Cement, Dalmia Bharat, and Ramco Cements posted mixed Q3 FY26 results with notable capacity expansion plans projected at 7.4% CAGR till FY28.
Ramco Cements, Star Cement, and Shree Cement showed varied revenue growth, while Orient Cement reported a decline in both QoQ and YoY revenue.
news.summary:
Shree Cement, Dalmia Bharat, and Ramco Cements posted mixed Q3 FY26 results with notable capacity expansion plans projected at 7.4% CAGR till FY28.
Ramco Cements, Star Cement, and Shree Cement showed varied revenue growth, while Orient Cement reported a decline in both QoQ and YoY revenue.

news.title:
Shree Cement reduces pricing gap to ₹15/bag, Q4 FY26 volumes to grow 5-8%.
FY27 growth projected at 10%, North India market share to stabilize at 16%.
news.summary:
Shree Cement reduces pricing gap to ₹15/bag, Q4 FY26 volumes to grow 5-8%.
FY27 growth projected at 10%, North India market share to stabilize at 16%.

news.title: Morgan Stanley maintains 'Equal-Weight' rating on Shree Cement with a target of Rs 29,600.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley maintains 'Equal-Weight' rating on Shree Cement with a target of Rs 29,600.

news.title:
Citi maintains a positive outlook on Shree Cement.
Citi reduces Shree Cement's target price to 31,650.
news.summary:
Citi maintains a positive outlook on Shree Cement.
Citi reduces Shree Cement's target price to 31,650.

news.title:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.
news.summary:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.

news.title:
Shree Cement projects Q4 sales of 9-9.5MT driven by infrastructure activity and RMC growth.
Plans include expanding RMC plants to 45 units, 72MT cement capacity by 2026, and ₹500Cr capex.
news.summary:
Shree Cement projects Q4 sales of 9-9.5MT driven by infrastructure activity and RMC growth.
Plans include expanding RMC plants to 45 units, 72MT cement capacity by 2026, and ₹500Cr capex.

news.title:
Shree Cement reports Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 22%, PAT increase.
Capacity expansion to 72 MTPA marks key development for Shree Cement.
news.summary:
Shree Cement reports Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 22%, PAT increase.
Capacity expansion to 72 MTPA marks key development for Shree Cement.

news.title:
Shree Cement's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹9.87B from ₹10.61B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 22.4% from 25.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Shree Cement's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹9.87B from ₹10.61B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 22.4% from 25.1% YoY.

news.title:
Shree Cement's Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The results, reviewed by statutory auditors, highlight a new commissioned plant in Rajasthan and compliance with updated labour codes.
news.summary:
Shree Cement's Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The results, reviewed by statutory auditors, highlight a new commissioned plant in Rajasthan and compliance with updated labour codes.

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.

news.title:
Shree Cement executed NSE block trade of ~19,519 shares at Rs. 27,010/share.
The total trade value for Shree Cement transaction was Rs. 52.72 crores.
news.summary:
Shree Cement executed NSE block trade of ~19,519 shares at Rs. 27,010/share.
The total trade value for Shree Cement transaction was Rs. 52.72 crores.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirms Shree Cement's long-term rating as CRISIL AAA Stable.
Short-term rating maintained at CRISIL A1 for ₹4,500 crore bank facilities.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirms Shree Cement's long-term rating as CRISIL AAA Stable.
Short-term rating maintained at CRISIL A1 for ₹4,500 crore bank facilities.

news.title:
Shree Cement executed a block trade of ~7,072 shares worth Rs. 19.7 cr.
The trade was priced at Rs. 27,805 per share on NSE.
news.summary:
Shree Cement executed a block trade of ~7,072 shares worth Rs. 19.7 cr.
The trade was priced at Rs. 27,805 per share on NSE.

news.title:
Shree Cement received BBB foreign currency issuer rating with stable outlook.
It holds AAA Stable long-term, A1 short-term credit ratings, and ESG score of 70.8.
news.summary:
Shree Cement received BBB foreign currency issuer rating with stable outlook.
It holds AAA Stable long-term, A1 short-term credit ratings, and ESG score of 70.8.

news.title:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.
news.summary:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.

news.title:
The MCA has ordered a probe into Shree Cement under Section 210(1)(c) of the Companies Act.
Shree Cement stated the investigation won't impact its financial or business operations.
news.summary:
The MCA has ordered a probe into Shree Cement under Section 210(1)(c) of the Companies Act.
Shree Cement stated the investigation won't impact its financial or business operations.

news.title:
Corporate Affairs Department begins investigation into Shree Cement.
Shree Cement must share necessary information for the inquiry.
news.summary:
Corporate Affairs Department begins investigation into Shree Cement.
Shree Cement must share necessary information for the inquiry.

news.title:
Shree Cement reports that the Indian government has ordered an investigation.
The government has sought specific information from Shree Cement for the probe.
news.summary:
Shree Cement reports that the Indian government has ordered an investigation.
The government has sought specific information from Shree Cement for the probe.
